content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 LOTARO: Cold Caller / VertriebsmitarbeiterIn (Freelance Basis) Anywhere in the World Sales and Marketing Contract <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Germany Munich </p> <p>Du bist Vollblut-Verkäufer und würdest gerne in einem der schnellst wachsenden Remote-Ed-Tech Unternehmen im deutschsprachigen Raum arbeiten?</p> <p>Mit unserem Unternehmen LOTARO haben wir aktuell ein Remote-Team aus +15 High-Performern.</p> <p>Konkret suchen wir nach Verstärkung in unserem Setting Team.</p> <p><strong>Warum du unbedingt Teil von Heartbeat werden solltest?</strong></p> <ul> <li>Extremer Produktfokus → du verkaufst ein echt gutes Produkt!</li> <li>Starkes Wachstum durch interne Weiterbildungen</li> <li>Einkommen selbst in der Hand haben</li> <li>Gute Aufstiegsmöglichkeiten bei starker Performance (Setter/Closer)</li> <li>Aufstrebendes Unternehmen mit großer Vision</li> <li>Flexible Arbeitsplatzgestaltung durch Remote-Kultur</li> </ul> <h2>Aufgaben</h2> <p>1. Qualifizierung von Leads</p> <p>2. Telefonische Vereinbarung von Sales Calls</p> <h2>Qualifikation</h2> <p><strong>Was du dafür mitbringen musst:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Erfahrung im Sales Bereich (B2B)</li> <li>Kommunikative Persönlichkeit</li> <li>Guten Umgang mit Menschen</li> <li>Volle Verfügbarkeit</li> <li>den Willen Vollgas zu geben</li> </ul> <p><strong>Berufserfahrung:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Vertrieb (B2B): 1 Jahr (notwendig)</li> </ul> <p><strong>Sprache:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Deutsch (Erforderlich)</li> </ul> <h2>Benefits</h2> <p><strong>Leistungen:</strong></p> <p>Betriebliche Weiterbildung</p> <p>Flexible Arbeitszeiten</p> <p>100% remote – arbeite von überall</p> <p><strong>Unsere Vision?</strong></p> <p>Wir bauen das beste Livetrainingsangebot für Unternehmen im deutschsprachigen Markt auf!</p> <p>Aktuell haben wir zu viele hungrige Interessenten und brauchen dringend High-Performer, die sich unsere Mission anschließen wollen.</p> <p>Wenn du also hungrig auf mehr bist und massiv wachsen möchtest - bewirb dich noch heute bei uns.</p> <p>Art der Stelle: Freelance</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/lotaro-cold-caller-vertriebsmitarbeiterin-freelance-basis">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/lotaro-cold-caller-vertriebsmitarbeiterin-freelance-basis</a></p> Wed, 20 May 2026 07:16:20 +0000 Fri, 19 Jun 2026 07:16:20 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/lotaro-cold-caller-vertriebsmitarbeiterin-freelance-basis https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/lotaro-cold-caller-vertriebsmitarbeiterin-freelance-basis Nomad: Senior Software Engineer II Anywhere in the World 🇺🇲 United States Minor Outlying Islands and 🇺🇸 United States of America Colorado Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5199/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Denver CO <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://nomadlease.com">https://nomadlease.com</a> </p> <p><strong>About Nomad</strong></p> <p>Nomad is unlocking economic opportunity for everyone in the long-term rental community. We offer property owners guaranteed rent and peace of mind, while delivering a better rental experience for residents. Backed by leading investors, we're transforming a massive, fragmented market with technology that makes renting better for everyone involved.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>About the Team</strong></p> <p>Nomad's Engineering team builds the platform that powers guaranteed rent, owner dashboards, resident experiences, and the operational tools that make our business run. We're a small, senior team that ships fast and owns our outcomes. You'll work alongside product, design, and ops to solve real problems in a massive, underserved market. We're entering a new phase of growth. This is a high-leverage moment to join.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>About the Role</strong></p> <p>We're hiring a Senior Software Engineer to take on meaningful ownership of our platform and deliver features that directly impact the business. You'll work across the stack, make real technical decisions, and ship end-to-end. This is a role for someone who's moved past needing close direction. You see what needs to be done, you build it well, and you make the people around you better in the process.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>In this role, you will:</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>Build and ship features across our Rails backend and Typescript+React frontend</p> </li> <li> <p>Play a crucial role in bringing solid engineering principles into multiple legacy codebases</p> </li> <li> <p>Own your work end-to-end; from technical design through implementation, testing, and deployment</p> </li> <li> <p>Collaborate directly with product and design to refine requirements and deliver solutions that move business metrics</p> </li> <li> <p>Write clean, well-tested code and contribute to improving our engineering standards</p> </li> <li> <p>Participate in code reviews and provide constructive feedback that raises the quality bar</p> </li> <li> <p>Identify and address technical debt, bugs, and performance issues proactively</p> </li> <li> <p>Contribute to architectural discussions and help the team make sound technical decisions</p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Who you are</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>An experienced product engineer with strong systems thinking abilities; you should be comfortable asking questions and improving the ideas that shape product iteration as well as executing on product vision</p> </li> <li> <p>Significant professional software engineering experience, with strong experience in Typescript+React, Ruby+Rails, and RDBMS (we use Postgre)</p> </li> <li> <p>You have experience with modern testing philosophies and can actively improve test suites that are slow, nondeterministic, or need updated practices</p> </li> <li> <p>Bonus: You have experience automating workflows, using Playwright, Slack bots, and other tooling</p> </li> <li> <p>You've shipped meaningful features or systems and can point to work you owned and delivered</p> </li> <li> <p>Solid technical fundamentals; you write clean code, think about edge cases, and care about quality</p> </li> <li> <p>You introduce and discuss modern tooling and libraries that solve recurring problems in the codebase</p> </li> <li> <p>You are relentless in pushing for simplified patterns in the code and you have examples of systems you've simplified.</p> </li> <li> <p>You have built out to
